reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 1.0 , reason:  [This outputs the previous token, but when parsing starts, oldToken is null, causing potential NullPointerException or missing first token output]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 1.0 , reason:  [This line incorrectly outputs the previous token (oldToken) instead of the current token being consumed. Also, when parsing starts, oldToken is null, which can cause NullPointerException or output incorrect tokens. Terminal tokens should be output when they are matched/consumed, not delayed until the next token is fetched.]

1682.reason: [The CompUnit syntax component should be output before parsing its children, not after. According to the specification, syntax component names should be output before completing analysis of that component.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [The CompUnit syntax component should be output before parsing its children, not after. According to the specification, syntax component names should be output before completing analysis of that component.]

1727.reason: [The <CompUnit> component should be output at the beginning of parsing, not at the end after all children are processed. According to the specification, syntax components should be output before analyzing their contents, but this outputs it after everything is parsed.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [This outputs <CompUnit> at the end, but it should be output at the beginning before parsing any of its components. The specification requires outputting the syntax component name before completing its analysis.]
